content.en:
"Let's get acquainted with life here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, through the Extreme Cause and Effect Path, he explored the location of the nest where his original identity of the primordial black beast was located.

Soon, Ye Tian came to a place, which was a huge black nest with a lot of space inside.

Moreover, some simple formations were arranged here, and Ye Tian quickly cracked the formations and entered them.

"From now on, this replica body will live here!"

Ye Tian decided.

His current identity is a primordial black beast named Bai Mo, and it should be okay among the Triple Primordial Black Beasts, but more information is not clear.

Next, Ye Tian rarely came out of this lair, and the primordial black beasts rarely communicated with each other, which made Ye Tian reduce the chance of exposure.

Moreover, he often spied on the private chats of some primordial black beasts, and gradually learned about the situation here.

This river basin was called away by this group of primordial black beasts, because the owner of this river basin was called the Nine Dust Ancestor, a half-step five-fold ancestor existence.

Some of the primordial black beasts also knew that the Nine Dust Domain had cooperation with the cultivator forces, but they didn't know exactly which cultivator forces it was, and they didn't want to know about it.

For the Primordial Black Beast, obey the orders of the higher-level Primordial Black Beast, and the rest does not need to be taken care of.

There is no limit to Ye Tian's copy body, and he continues to cultivate the original Zhou Tian Diagram to strengthen the strength of this copy body, otherwise the strength is too weak, and if he really encounters something, he will not be able to save his life!

He had already comprehended more than a hundred extreme paths, so this replica body naturally improved its strength very quickly, and all kinds of black characters could be engraved into the body.

this day.

Another batch of primordial black beasts was sent out, and Ye Tian estimated that they were going to attack Sunset Mountain.

However, his replica body was not ordered, apparently replaced by a batch of primordial black beasts.

Sure enough, not long after, Sunset Mountain was attacked, and a major battle broke out.

Moreover, many of the Triple Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate have been re-transferred, and many of the Triple Ancestor's will clones have died in battle, and they have not recovered yet.

Therefore, this battle was fought very hard, and many of the will clones of the Triple Ancestor died in battle, but in the end they still kept Sunset Mountain.

this day.

The Ancestor of the Ghost Gate came to the Nine Dust Domain again.

"Jiuchen, haven't those primordial black beasts under your command captured Sunset Mountain yet?" asked the Ancestor of the Ghost Gate.

Jiuchen said coldly: "We captured it before, but we were recaptured again. The Voidless Heavenly Gate is the fourfold Heavenly Gate of your Upper Spirit Origin Domain, but it is not an ordinary small force, our Jiuchen strength is too weak, and your Nine Light Holy Gate is unwilling to support, it is not difficult for our Gate to take the Sunset Mountain, but what's the point of not being able to keep it?"

"Jiuchen, you should know very well that if you can't take the Sunset Mountain, you won't be able to get the Sunset Orb, and the Dawn Saint Ancestor will be very angry!" said the Ghost Gate Ancestor.

"Dawn Holy Ancestor!"

When Jiuchen thought of the Dawn Holy Ancestor, his face became very solemn.

He was able to have today, because the Dawn Holy Ancestor promoted him and gave him a chance.

Moreover, he also knew the terrifyingness of the Dawn Holy Ancestor, it was not him who was in charge of so many primordial black beasts at the beginning, but his boss, and as a result, that boss was pinched to death by the Dawn Holy Ancestor with one hand, and this was his rise.

The Dawn Holy Ancestor was the Fivefold Ancestor of the Nine Light Holy Land, far from being comparable to the Fourfold Ancestor, and even the Half-Step Fivefold Ancestor was far from being the opponent of the Fivefold Ancestor.

"Ancestor of the Ghost Gate, give me some more years, I will recruit some more primordial black beasts, and continue to attack Sunset Mountain when the time comes. When the Triple Origin Ancestor of the Voidless Heavenly Gate falls too much, they may be in a situation where there is no Triple Origin Ancestor to send. When the time comes, we in the Nine Dust Domain will be able to completely take down Sunset Mountain!" Jiuchen assured.

"Okay, I'm waiting for your good news!"

The Ancestor of the Ghost Gate nodded slightly, and then left directly.

After the Ancestor of the Ghost Gate left, Jiuchen's face was frosty: "Dawn Holy Ancestor, damn it, if I wait for me to become a Fivefold Ancestor, I don't need to look at your face and follow your orders." When the time comes, I will directly let the Nine Dust Domain get out of your control, so that you can't find the Nine Dust Domain. "

Of course, he wouldn't dare to do that now.

The Dawn Ancestor integrated a special item into the Nine Dust Domain, which was able to lock the location of the Nine Dust Domain, and also refined one-tenth of the origin of the Nine Dust Domain.

Therefore, if he dared to do this now, the Dawn Saint Ancestor would come soon, and he would be dead.

......

In the following years, the Nine Dust Domain attacked Sunset Mountain again and again, leaving the Voidless Heavenly Gate helpless, and the other three ancestors were unwilling to garrison Sunset Mountain.

If it weren't for the benefit of the empty sky, those Triple Primordial Ancestors would really have to run away!

this day.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was ordered by the Nine Dust Domain to go to another treasure place to guard it, and return with other primordial black beasts.

According to the rules of the Nine Dust Domain, once you attack Sunset Mountain and come back alive, you can not go for a long time.

If there was no such rule, these primordial black beasts would have run away a long time ago, and they wouldn't want to be sent to death!

Therefore, Ye Tian was now sent to a treasure land, replacing the other primordial black beasts back, and then going to continue the attack on Sunset Mountain.

"Treasure Land!"

Ye Tian was a little moved, this is a good opportunity!

Soon, Ye Tian followed nearly a thousand Triple Primordial Ancestors to the Primordial Black Sea, and then kept shuttling and coming to a treasure land.

This treasure land is similar to Sunset Mountain, only the Triple Origin Ancestor is allowed, and the Triple Origin Ancestor cannot enter.

This treasure land is very important to the Nine Dust Domain, it is a very important resource treasure land, and it also gives birth to a resource that is very important to the primordial black beast - dust gold liquid, which can quench the body of the primordial black beast and refine the bloodline.

Of course, there are also a lot of other resources.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian came to this place called the Land of Leaving the Dust, and then began to sit here, while the other primordial black beasts left here and returned to the Nine Dust Domain.

These Primordial Black Beasts sat in the Land of the Dust, not to guard against cultivators, but against other Primordial Black Beast forces.

There were many primordial black beasts in the primordial black sea, and they also needed resources suitable for them, so they also established one force after another, and the Nine Dust Domain was just one of them.

These Primordial Black Beasts are also fiercely competitive, and the Land of Dust is a fixed location, not a river basin, so it is necessary to send Primordial Black Beasts to guard it from being invaded.

When guarding this place, these primordial black beasts are not allowed to leave, unless they are allowed to leave unless they are ordered to do so, which is also to prevent this place from being exposed.

Moreover, it would take a long time for the resources here to be concentrated in the Nine Dust Domain.

It's a pity that the batch of primordial black beasts that just left took this batch of resources and sent them back to the Nine Dust Domain.

"I can only wait for the resources to continue to accumulate, and when the resources here accumulate to a certain extent, I will let the cultivators copy the body and snatch the resources here!"

Ye Tian muttered.
